text.title: Action Item Stale Aging Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Action Item Stale Aging methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: pull-open-items
step.action: Fetch open action-items with owner, age-in-cycles, last-update.

step.name: apply-aging-thresholds
step.action: Tag each item: fresh / aging (3+ cycles) / stale (5+ cycles).

step.name: escalate-or-drop
step.action: Stale items → escalation channel; orphaned → reassign or drop with rationale.
